title: crotalaria hoffmannii
intro: Crotalaria hoffmannii, also known as Hoffmann's rattlebox or Hoffmann's rattle pod, is a plant species in the legume family (Fabaceae) that is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain a toxic compound called cytisine, a potential anti-tumor agent. The health benefits associated with Crotalaria hoffmannii include its potential use in treating cancer, inflammation, and other conditions. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria hoffmannii seeds can be used in traditional medicine, although it is essential to note that the plant's toxicity and potential side effects require caution and proper guidance.
